name: New Consumer Electronics Categories Appear in Time for Christmas
description: Aberdeen hot topic report authored by Russ Craig covering new consumer electronics product categories emerging in October 2003. Three products are highlighted: (1) Hand Held Entertainment's ZVUE pocket video/music player ($99, SD card-based, MPEG-4), a low-cost challenger to Sony's Clie; (2) Roku HD1000 HDTV digital media player ($499.99, Linux-based, WiFi/Ethernet, multi-card slots) by ReplayTV founder Anthony Wood; (3) NEC's water/methanol fuel-cell laptop prototype shown at WPC Expo Tokyo (5-hour battery, planned sale 2004; 40-hour version planned 2005). Aberdeen concludes that non-traditional CE companies are driving innovation while traditional global CE brands fall by the wayside.
